mapper.select: SELECT tb1.word_no, tb1.level, tb2.category_name, tb1.kor_word, tb1.kor_romanization, tb1.kor_audio_url, tb1.kk_word, tb1.kk_romanization, tb1.kk_audio_url FROM tb_words tb1 LEFT JOIN tb_category tb2 ON tb2.category_no = tb1.category_no;
SELECT t1.user_id, t1.native_lang, t1.target_lang, t1.daily_word_limit FROM tb_user_settings t1 WHERE t1.user_id = #{userId}
